summary: DELETE pre-1982 events before re-ingesting the ntsb_pre1982 source.
reason: The PRE1982 branch previously skipped the wipe entirely. Re-running `sync --source ntsb --include-pre1982` after the upstream PRE1982.zip changed left removed rows in place and either silently skipped or PK-collided on modified ones. The targeted DELETE keeps re-ingest idempotent without touching the 1982-present rows owned by the avall source.
